text: New preprint on medRxiv: Mitochondrial induced T cell apoptosis and aberrant myeloid metabolic programs define distinct immune cell subsets during acute and recovered SARS-CoV-2 infection.
Our paper Single-cell ATAC-seq signal extraction and enhancement with SCATE is published in Genome Biology.
Our paper Global prediction of chromatin accessibility using small-cell-number and single-cell RNA-seq is published in Nucleic Acids Research.
Our paper Genome-wide Prediction of DNase I Hypersensitivity Using Gene Expression is published in Nature Communications.
